nodes.label: Normalizes Unicode characters to their standard ASCII equivalents.
Find and replace text using a chain of increasingly fuzzy matching strategies.
Detect tool-call escape-drift artifacts in new_string.      Looks for ``\\'``
Apply replacements at the given positions.          Args:         content: Or
Strategy 2: Match with line-by-line whitespace trimming.          Strips leadi
Strategy 3: Collapse multiple whitespace to single space.
Strategy 4: Ignore indentation differences entirely.          Strips all leadi
Strategy 5: Convert escape sequences to actual characters.          Handles \\
Strategy 6: Trim whitespace from first and last lines only.          Useful wh
Build a list mapping each original character index to its normalized index.
Convert (start, end) positions in the normalised string to original positions.
Strategy 7: Unicode normalisation.      Normalises smart quotes, em/en-dashes,
Strategy 8: Match by anchoring on first and last lines.     Adjusted with permi
Strategy 9: Line-by-line similarity with 50% threshold.          Finds blocks
Calculate start and end character positions from line indices.      Args:
Find matches in normalized content and map back to original positions.
Map positions from normalized string back to original.          This is a best
Find lines in content most similar to old_string for "did you mean?" feedback.
Return a '\\n\\nDid you mean...' snippet for plain no-match errors.      Gated
